sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67194" key="metoiste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετοιστέον</orth>, <sense id="n67194.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must transfer</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">διαφορὰν ἐπὶ τὸ σῶμα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.656d</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
